Defines a header guard for the `inttypes.h` file without additional content.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that uses include guards to prevent multiple inclusions of the same file. The `#ifndef INTTYPES_H` and `#define INTTYPES_H` directives ensure that the contents of the file are only included once during compilation. This is a common practice in C programming to avoid redefinition errors. The file does not contain any additional code or declarations beyond the include guards.
